creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
See attached patch.  This fixes things.  There was a remaining BASH-ism 
in the configure script that need eradicating, and two files needed 
execute permission that weren't getting it.  Also, resynced the build 
so repeated make deinstall reinstall sequences won't fail.

P.S. lioux, this patch fixes the remaining issues that I discussed with 
you earlier.  Use this patch.
